/usr/bin/gcc -g CMakeFiles/myvim.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/myvim.dir/src/buffer.c.o CMakeFiles/myvim.dir/src/screen.c.o CMakeFiles/myvim.dir/src/terminal.c.o CMakeFiles/myvim.dir/src/modes.c.o CMakeFiles/myvim.dir/src/commands.c.o CMakeFiles/myvim.dir/src/file_manager.c.o CMakeFiles/myvim.dir/src/windows.c.o -o myvim
